prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2024年理科最低位次约12264→14612→12721→13432，整体在1.2万–1.5万间波动；2025年山西省首次实施新高考（物理类/历史类），位次体系重构，物理类最低位次约28419名（再选不限组），较往年理科位次大幅后移，主要因考试模式变化而非学校热度下降；该校在山西理科/物理类计划：2021年118人、2022年125人、2023年125人、2024年130人、2025年137人，持续小幅扩招；2026年计划138人，较2025年增加1人，扩幅约0.7%，竞争略有加剧但影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第76名，近年排名稳定在69–77区间，属中上水平211；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及学校管理回应（学生会会长提及军训规模与校园安全），无明显负面舆情；抖音热度未进入前100名，曝光度一般；未见投档线异常记录；矿业工程、安全科学与工程为传统优势领域（第五轮评估中中国矿业大学安全科学与工程A+），与该校招生专业中的安全科学与工程类、采矿工程、矿物加工工程等直接对应；计算机、电气等热门专业亦开设齐全。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业2026年持续高热推荐；土木建筑、生化环材等呈劝退趋势；山西省2026年物理类考生167419人，较2025年173347人减少约5928人（-3.4%），竞争压力略有缓解；该校位于北京，对山西考生有较强地域吸引力；2025年在山西招生28人（占全国总招生598人的4.68%），2024年19人（占759人的2.50%），占比上升，显示该校对山西生源重视度提高。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考位次基准、2026年计划微扩0.7%、山西物理类考生减少约3.4%、声誉中性偏正面、北京地域吸引力等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年基准略有前移（竞争略缓解），预测最低位次约28494名，区间27994–28994名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间27994–28994名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（安全科学与工程类、数学类、机械类），一档专业（计算机、电气、人工智能）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（土木、化工、环境、地质）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<27994）可重点冲击一档热门专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum science rankings were approximately 12264 → 14612 → 12721 → 13432, fluctuating overall between 12,000 and 15,000; in 2025, Shanxi Province implemented the new college entrance examination for the first time (Physics Category/History Category), restructuring the ranking system, with the minimum ranking for Physics Category being approximately 28419 (no re-selection restriction group), significantly lower than previous science rankings, mainly due to changes in the examination format rather than a decline in the school's popularity; the school's enrollment plan in Shanxi for science/Physics Category: 118 in 2021, 125 in 2022, 125 in 2023, 130 in 2024, 137 in 2025, with continuous slight expansion; the 2026 plan is 138, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, an expansion of about 0.7%, with slightly intensified competition but limited impact.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked 76th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 69–77 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management responses (student council president mentioned military training scale and campus safety), with no obvious negative public opinion; Douyin popularity not in the top 100, with average exposure; no abnormal record of admission cutoffs; mining engineering and safety science and engineering are traditional advantageous fields (in the fifth round of evaluation, China University of Mining and Technology's safety science and engineering was A+), directly corresponding to the school's enrollment majors such as safety science and engineering, mining engineering, and mineral processing engineering; popular majors like computer science and electrical engineering are also fully offered.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electrical engineering and automation, electronic information/communication and other majors continue to be highly recommended in 2026; civil engineering, biochemistry, environmental science, and materials science show a trend of discouragement; in 2026, there are 167,419 Physics Category candidates in Shanxi Province, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure; the school is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Shanxi candidates; in 2025, it enrolled 28 students in Shanxi (accounting for 4.68% of the national total of 598), compared to 19 in 2024 (accounting for 2.50% of 759), with an increased proportion, indicating the school's increased emphasis on Shanxi student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 new college entrance examination ranking baseline, the 2026 plan's slight expansion of 0.7%, the decrease of about 3.4% in Shanxi Physics Category candidates, a neutral to slightly positive reputation, and Beijing's regional appeal, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to the 2025 baseline (competition slightly eased), with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 28494, and a range of 27994–28994.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 27994–28994, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Safety Science and Engineering, Mathematics, Mechanical Engineering) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Artificial Intelligence) as a sprint option, and Tier 3 majors (Civil Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Geology) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<27994), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors.
